extension.description: Query MiniMax Token Plan usage and show detailed stats in the VS Code status bar.
command.refresh.title: MiniMax Usage: Refresh
command.showDetails.title: MiniMax Usage: Show Details
command.setApiKey.title: MiniMax Usage: Set API Key
command.clearApiKey.title: MiniMax Usage: Clear API Key
command.copyRawResponse.title: MiniMax Usage: Copy Raw Response
configuration.title: MiniMax Usage
configuration.showWeeklyInStatusBar.desc: Show weekly usage summary in the status bar text.
configuration.detailModelLimit.descripti: How many models to display in the status bar tooltip and details panel.
configuration.statusBarAlignment.descrip: Alignment of the MiniMax usage status items.
configuration.language.description: Language for runtime texts in the extension UI. Static command and setting labels still follow the VS Code display language.
configuration.language.auto: Follow the VS Code display language.
configuration.language.zhCN: Force Simplified Chinese for runtime texts.
